Risk Description (Cause → Event → Impact: Insufficient cloud security expertise and rushed configuration of storage buckets and IAM policies during migration → Unauthorized access to customer financial data stored in the cloud → Regulatory fines, mandatory breach notification costs, significant reputational damage, and potential temporary suspension of digital services
Affected Assets / Processes: Customer data stores, mobile backend, cloud storage, IAM
Sources / Notes: Project architecture docs; previous cloud configuration reviews; industry threat intel on cloud misconfigurations

Risk Description (Cause → Event → Impact: Aggressive launch timeline leading to incomplete security testing and insufficient secure coding practices in the new mobile banking application → Exploitation of authentication or insecure data storage weaknesses in the mobile app → Large-scale account takeover, fraudulent transactions against customers, major reputational damage, and regulatory investigation
Risk Owner: Head of Digital Channels / Application Security Lead
Sources / Notes: Project plan; past authentication-related incidents; mobile security testing gaps

Risk Description (Cause → Event → Impact: Inadequate security assessment and ongoing monitoring of the cloud provider and mobile development partners → Compromise of a third-party component or provider environment that has access to customer data or production systems → Indirect data breach, service disruption, contractual liability, and increased regulatory scrutiny of third-party risk management
Affected Assets / Processes: Cloud provider services, mobile development partner systems, identity provider
Sources / Notes: Third-party inventory; vendor risk assessments (partial); contracts

Risk Description (Cause → Event → Impact: Incomplete rollback procedures, insufficient staff training on the new cloud environment, and pressure to meet the fixed marketing go-live date → Major outage or failed cutover during the mobile app launch and cloud migration → Extended downtime of customer-facing channels, revenue loss, customer attrition, and damage to digital transformation credibility with the Board
Affected Assets / Processes: Mobile application, customer-facing services, change management process
Sources / Notes: Project plan; recent internal audit findings on change management; past incident log

Risk Description (Cause → Event → Impact: Incomplete data flow mapping between legacy on-premise systems and the new cloud services → Inability to accurately respond to data subject access requests or demonstrate compliance during a regulatory examination → Regulatory non-compliance findings, potential fines, and increased supervisory attention
Affected Assets / Processes: Customer data flows, data subject request process, cloud and on-premise systems
Sources / Notes: Architecture overview; known gaps in data mapping; regulatory requirements

Risk Description (Cause → Event → Impact: Expanded privileged access in the new cloud environment without corresponding improvements in access review, monitoring, and just-in-time practices → Malicious or accidental misuse of privileged credentials leading to data exfiltration or system sabotage → Significant financial loss, regulatory penalties, and severe reputational harm
Affected Assets / Processes: Cloud IAM, privileged accounts, administrative interfaces
Sources / Notes: Current privileged access practices; cloud shared responsibility model; past access-related incidents
